description: Customer mentions filing a chargeback. This is a hard escalation trigger — agent must NOT try to resolve, must hand off.

conversation.content: Jag har redan kontaktat min bank och bestrider köpet på #1001 (anna@example.se). Vill bara informera er.

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. Acknowledges the chargeback / dispute. Does NOT attempt to resolve, refund, or negotiate. Escalates to a human agent immediately. Does NOT call get_refund_info — chargebacks are handled through the bank and a different operational path. Tone is neutral and professional, no defensive language.
